title: onosma bracteosa
intro: Onosma bracteosa, also known as Indian onosma or bracteate onosma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Onosma bracteosa include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Onosma bracteosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
